Synthetic fixture

Ship your AI-built mini app with fewer surprises.

LaunchPad is a fake demo page used to test screenshots, overflow detection, links, and click-target checks before a product goes public.

This launch-readiness label is intentionally too long for this compact metric chip.
View report

Pre-launch checklist

Mobile smoke

Capture a phone-sized screenshot and look for layout drift.

Console health

Fail fast on runtime errors before sharing the URL.
